domain_archetypes.name: worker evidence replay
domain_archetypes.trigger: worker signal changes while lives context is stale
domain_archetypes.expected: block release until cited evidence is regenerated

domain_archetypes.name: lives boundary probe
domain_archetypes.trigger: lives handoff crosses a policy or trust boundary
domain_archetypes.expected: route to reviewer with evidence packet

domain_archetypes.name: isolation regression harness
domain_archetypes.trigger: isolation behavior regresses against the last accepted fixture
domain_archetypes.expected: open a regression issue with trace and benchmark delta

domain_archetypes.name: observability operator packet
domain_archetypes.trigger: observability output needs a human-readable audit packet
domain_archetypes.expected: accept only if decision claims cite fixture evidence
